executive_summary: Analysis of 6 papers on on-device AI optimization techniques. Focus areas include quantization, pruning, and model compression with average relevance score of 1/100 and 2 high-impact papers.

takeaways.text: Implement INT8 quantization for immediate 4x speedup in mobile
takeaways.source: INT8 Quantization: Achieving 4x Model Compression on Mobile Devices

takeaways.text: Implement aggressive batching and KV caching
takeaways.source: INT8 Quantization: Achieving 4x Model Compression on Mobile Devices

takeaways.text: Use fine-grained structured pruning for edge optimization
takeaways.source: INT8 Quantization: Achieving 4x Model Compression on Mobile Devices

takeaways.text: Implement knowledge distillation pipelines in production
takeaways.source: INT8 Quantization: Achieving 4x Model Compression on Mobile Devices

takeaways.text: Use mixed precision for training and inference
takeaways.source: INT8 Quantization: Achieving 4x Model Compression on Mobile Devices

sources.title: INT8 Quantization: Achieving 4x Model Compression on Mobile Devices
sources.summary: Advanced techniques for 8-bit integer quantization achieving 75% size reduction with minimal accuracy loss

sources.title: Structured Pruning for Edge AI: A Comprehensive Study
sources.summary: Research on structured pruning methods achieving 50% sparsity

sources.title: Knowledge Distillation for Efficient Mobile Models
sources.summary: Student-teacher model compression achieving 6x size reduction

sources.title: Mixed Precision Training for Efficient Inference
sources.summary: FP16/INT8 hybrid approach for optimal performance

sources.title: On-Device LLM Inference: Techniques and Trade-offs
sources.summary: Practical approaches for running large language models on device

sources.title: Neural Architecture Search for Efficient Mobile Models
sources.summary: Automated discovery of optimal architectures for constrained devices
